label: clearly_unfair
explanation: If your data is stolen or exposed in a security breach, the service is not obligated to inform you. You may never find out that your personal information was compromised.

text: The service can prevent you from taking legal action by changing jurisdiction
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: The service can unilaterally change the legal jurisdiction that governs your agreement, moving any disputes to a location where it is practically or financially impossible for you to pursue a case.

text: Your data continues to be used after you request account deletion for an undefined period
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: After you delete your account, the service continues to process and use your data for an unspecified period of time before anything is actually deleted.

text: The service collects information about your offline purchases through partners
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: The service collects data about purchases you make in physical stores through partnerships with payment processors or retail loyalty programs, even when you are not using the service.

text: The service can remove any earned rewards, credits, or discounts at any time
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Any loyalty points, discounts, referral bonuses, or rewards you have earned can be taken away by the service at any time and without any compensation or explanation.

text: You agree to pay legal costs if you sue the service and lose
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: If you bring a legal claim against the service and do not win, you are responsible for paying the service's legal fees. This acts as a strong financial deterrent to seeking justice.

text: You can see a complete list of every third party your data is shared with
label: clearly_fair
explanation: The service publishes a full, up-to-date list of every company or organization that receives your personal data. You always know exactly who has access to your information.

text: This service deletes all your data within 48 hours of account deletion
label: clearly_fair
explanation: When you delete your account, all your personal data is permanently removed from the service's systems within 48 hours. You do not have to wait weeks or chase them for confirmation.

text: The service has never and will never sell your personal data
label: clearly_fair
explanation: The service makes a clear, binding promise that it will not sell your personal information to anyone, ever — not to advertisers, data brokers, or any other party.

text: You can opt out of every non-essential data collection with one click
label: clearly_fair
explanation: A single button lets you disable all data collection that is not strictly necessary for the service to work. You do not have to hunt through settings or fill in forms.

text: The service notifies you by email within 24 hours of any data breach
label: clearly_fair
explanation: If a security breach affects your data, you will receive an email within 24 hours telling you what happened, what data was involved, and what you should do next.

text: All content you post is licensed only for use within this service
label: clearly_fair
explanation: The service can only use your content to display it within their own platform. They cannot publish it elsewhere, use it in ads, or license it to third parties.

text: This service supports right-to-erasure requests under GDPR and processes them within 30 days
label: clearly_fair
explanation: If you ask for your data to be deleted under your legal rights, the service will complete the deletion within 30 days and confirm it to you in writing.

text: This service does not share your data with any government unless legally compelled by a court
label: clearly_fair
explanation: The service will only provide your data to governments or authorities when a court of law formally orders it to do so. Informal requests are always refused.

text: You can turn off data collection entirely and still use the full service
label: clearly_fair
explanation: Disabling all optional data collection does not remove any features or limit your experience. The complete service is available to you even with maximum privacy settings enabled.

text: The service stores all your data on servers located in your own country
label: clearly_fair
explanation: Your data never leaves your home country. This means it stays under your local privacy laws and is not subject to the weaker protections of other jurisdictions.

text: No automated system can ban your account without a human reviewing the decision first
label: clearly_fair
explanation: Automated moderation systems cannot act alone. Any account action, including suspension or ban, must be reviewed and confirmed by a human being before it takes effect.

text: This service allows you to use a pseudonym and never requires your real name
label: clearly_fair
explanation: You are completely free to use a made-up name or handle. The service never requires you to disclose your real identity, protecting your anonymity.

text: Your data is encrypted in a way that even the service's own staff cannot read it
label: clearly_fair
explanation: The encryption used means that your personal data is unreadable to anyone — including the service's own employees. Only you hold the key to access your information.

text: The service publishes its full source code so anyone can verify its privacy claims
label: clearly_fair
explanation: The service's code is open source and publicly available. Independent security researchers and developers can verify that the service actually does what its privacy policy promises.

text: All changes to the privacy policy require you to actively agree before they take effect
label: clearly_fair
explanation: Privacy policy changes never take effect just because you kept using the service. You are always shown exactly what changed and must actively click to accept before the new terms apply.

text: This service does not display any advertising of any kind
label: clearly_fair
explanation: There are no advertisements on this service in any form. Your data is never used for advertising and no advertiser receives any information about you.

text: You receive a full refund if you cancel your subscription within the first 30 days
label: clearly_fair
explanation: If you change your mind after signing up, you have 30 days to cancel and receive a complete refund with no questions asked and no deductions.

text: The service provides two-factor authentication free of charge to all users
label: clearly_fair
explanation: You can secure your account with two-factor authentication at no extra cost. This adds a powerful layer of protection against unauthorized access.

text: This service does not collect any data from users under the age of 16
label: clearly_fair
explanation: The service actively screens for underage users and does not collect, store, or process personal data from anyone under 16 years old in compliance with child protection laws.

text: The service's data retention policy is capped at a maximum of 12 months
label: clearly_fair
explanation: The service keeps your data for a maximum of 12 months, after which it is automatically and permanently deleted. There is no indefinite storage of your personal information.

text: You can revoke any data consent at any time and the change takes effect immediately
label: clearly_fair
explanation: If you change your mind about any data permission you gave, you can withdraw consent instantly. The service stops using your data for that purpose right away — no delays.

text: This service's privacy practices are certified by an independent third-party auditor
label: clearly_fair
explanation: An independent organization regularly audits this service's privacy practices and certifies that they meet the standards promised in the privacy policy.

text: The service provides a dedicated privacy helpline available seven days a week
label: clearly_fair
explanation: A real person is available to answer your privacy questions every day of the week. You can call or message to ask anything about how your data is used.

text: All cookies used by this service are optional except the one needed to keep you logged in
label: clearly_fair
explanation: Only one cookie is required — the one that keeps you signed in. Every other cookie is optional and can be declined without affecting your use of the service.

text: This service operates as a nonprofit and has no commercial interest in your data
label: clearly_fair
explanation: The service is run as a nonprofit organization. Because it has no commercial motivation, there is no financial incentive to exploit or sell your personal data.

text: You are given at least 90 days notice before any significant change to the terms
label: clearly_fair
explanation: If the service plans to make any major change to its terms or privacy policy, it will tell you at least 90 days in advance, giving you plenty of time to decide what to do.

text: The service may make its premium features temporarily free to encourage you to upgrade
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: The service might unlock paid features for free for a limited time to get you used to them, then revert them to paid. This is designed to encourage you to buy a subscription.

text: Your data may be used to improve features you do not personally use
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Your activity and personal data may be analyzed to improve parts of the service that you yourself never use, meaning your information benefits other users rather than you.

text: The service may transfer your account to a regional partner without your approval
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If you are in a certain country, your account and data may be transferred to a local partner company without asking you first, and that partner operates under its own terms.

text: The service may display sponsored content in your personal feed without labeling it clearly
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Paid promotional content may appear in your feed in a format that looks similar to regular content, making it hard to tell what is an advertisement and what is not.

text: Your account may be flagged if you use privacy tools such as a VPN
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Using a VPN or other privacy-protecting technology may cause the service to flag your account as suspicious, potentially leading to restrictions or verification requirements.

text: The service may keep partial data after you delete your account for fraud prevention
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: After account deletion, some of your data may be retained to protect against fraud or misuse. The service decides what counts as necessary to keep, without your input.

text: The service may share your data in aggregate with industry bodies
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Your data — combined with data from other users and stripped of direct identifiers — may be shared with industry organizations for research, benchmarking, or policy purposes.

text: The service may charge you if your usage significantly exceeds the average
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If your use of the service is much higher than average, you may receive a bill for the excess — even if this threshold is not clearly defined when you sign up.

text: The service may adjust what content you see based on your account payment status
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Whether you are on a free or paid plan may affect what content the algorithm shows you, with paid users potentially receiving wider or more favorable distribution.

text: The service may contact you by post if you provide a mailing address
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If you enter a physical address, the service may use it to send you marketing material by post. This is a form of direct marketing you may not have expected to receive.

text: The service reserves the right to reject your username without giving a reason
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: The service can refuse or change your chosen username at any time without explaining why. You have no right to a specific username even if you have used it for years.

text: The service may limit the number of messages you can send per day
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Daily messaging limits may be applied to your account, especially on free plans. Exceeding the limit could result in delayed delivery or a requirement to upgrade.

text: The service may use your interaction history to test new features on you without notice
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: You may be selected to test new features based on your account history. These experiments could change how the service works for you without prior notice or explanation.

text: The service may restrict access to your data export if you submit requests too frequently
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If you request data exports too often, the service may impose a waiting period between requests, limiting how quickly you can retrieve and back up your own information.

text: The service may keep your username reserved even after you delete your account
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: After account deletion, your username may be taken out of circulation permanently — meaning no one else can use it but you also cannot reclaim it if you return.

text: The service may impose country-specific restrictions that reduce your rights
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Users in certain countries may be subject to additional restrictions that go beyond those applied to users in other regions, due to local legal or commercial arrangements.

text: The service may use your stored payment method for automatic renewals without a reminder
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Subscriptions may be automatically renewed using your saved payment card without sending you a reminder beforehand, making it easy to be charged without intending to renew.

text: The service may limit your ability to share content externally from the platform
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: You may be restricted in how you share content outside the service, for example by limiting what can be exported or copied, in order to keep users engaged on the platform.

text: The service may require additional verification if you use the service from a new device
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Logging in from a new device may trigger a full identity verification process that takes time to complete, during which you cannot access your account.

text: The service may apply different community guidelines to users in different countries
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: The rules you are expected to follow may differ depending on your country. Users in some regions may face stricter content rules or fewer protections than others.

text: The service may use your account for beta testing without giving you a choice to opt out
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: You may be enrolled in beta testing programs that expose you to unfinished or experimental features that could be unstable, without being given a way to opt out.

text: The service may disable your account if it detects unusual login patterns
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Unusual login behavior — like logging in from two different cities in a short time — may trigger an automatic account lockout that requires effort to resolve.

text: Your content may be removed if it is reported by other users regardless of its accuracy
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Content that receives multiple user reports may be removed while under review, even if it is entirely accurate and does not actually violate any rules.

text: The service may restrict your ability to delete old posts after a certain period
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: After content has been live for a certain amount of time, the service may limit or remove your ability to delete it, leaving old posts permanently on the platform.

text: The service may not honor refund requests made more than 14 days after purchase
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Refund requests submitted more than 14 days after a purchase will typically be declined, even if you have barely used the service or experienced a significant problem.

text: The service may change how your data is used when you move to a different country
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If you relocate to a different country, the applicable version of the privacy policy may change, potentially resulting in fewer protections for your data.

text: The service may display your account name or activity in public leaderboards
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Your username and usage statistics may be shown in public rankings or leaderboards visible to all users, without giving you the ability to opt out.

text: The service may use third-party tools to detect prohibited activity on your account
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: External vendors may be used to monitor your account for suspicious or prohibited behavior, meaning your account data is analyzed by companies outside the service's direct control.

text: The service may limit features available during a free trial without clear disclosure
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Free trial accounts may have hidden limitations compared to paid accounts that are not clearly explained at the time of sign-up, affecting your ability to evaluate the service fairly.

text: The service may make it difficult to cancel a subscription by requiring a phone call
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: To cancel your paid subscription, you may be required to call a phone number rather than using a simple online option, creating friction designed to discourage cancellation.

text: The service may transfer your data to a third party following a financial restructuring
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If the service undergoes financial restructuring — such as selling assets or entering administration — your personal data may be transferred to a third party as part of that process.

text: The service may use your email for re-engagement campaigns after extended inactivity
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If you stop using the service for a period of time, the service may send you email campaigns specifically designed to bring you back, using your past data to personalize them.

text: The service may assign you a permanent device fingerprint even in private browsing mode
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Even if you use private or incognito mode, the service may be able to identify your device using a combination of technical signals, creating a persistent identifier.

text: The service may make some features inaccessible in regions with strong privacy laws
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Certain features may be switched off for users in countries with strong privacy legislation, not to protect those users, but to avoid the compliance cost of offering those features there.

text: The service may retain records of deleted messages for operational purposes
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Messages you delete are removed from your view but may still be stored by the service in operation logs or backups for a period of time for infrastructure or legal reasons.

text: The service may offer a lower-cost plan that involves more aggressive data collection
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Cheaper subscription tiers may come with increased data collection and more targeted advertising as the trade-off for the lower price, which may not be prominently disclosed.

text: The service may use data from your free account to subsidize its paid service
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Data collected from users on the free plan is commercially exploited to generate revenue that funds the development of premium features, with no benefit passed to free users.

text: The service may require acceptance of new terms before accessing previously created content
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If you have not logged in for a while, you may be forced to accept new terms before you can access any content you previously created or stored on the service.

text: The service may record the times and durations of all your sessions permanently
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: The time you log in, how long you stay, and when you log out are recorded permanently for every session. Over time this builds a detailed picture of your daily routine.

text: The service may show you ads for services you searched for before using this platform
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If you searched for something on the internet before visiting this service, information from your browsing history may be used to show you related advertisements.

text: The service may suspend access during disputes over billing without refunding the affected period
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If there is a billing dispute on your account, your access may be suspended while it is under investigation, and you may not receive a refund for the period you were locked out.

text: Users may not use automated tools to interact with the service without permission
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Using bots, scrapers, or other automated software to interact with the service is not allowed unless you have specific written permission. This helps maintain fair access for all users.

text: The service may send you a message when a new feature relevant to your account is added
label: potentially_fair
explanation: If the service adds something new that applies to your account type or usage, it may send you a notification. This is informational and helps you make the most of the service.

text: The service may store encrypted backups of your data in multiple data centers
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Your data may be backed up in several secure locations to protect against data loss. These backups are encrypted and are used only to restore your data if something goes wrong.

text: You may be asked to confirm your email address again if you change it
label: potentially_fair
explanation: When you update your email address, the service sends a confirmation to the new address before making the change. This prevents others from hijacking your account with a false email.

text: The service may use your session data to auto-save your progress
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Information about your current session may be stored temporarily to make sure your progress is saved if your connection drops or you close the app unexpectedly.

text: The service may restrict posting frequency to prevent spam
label: potentially_fair
explanation: There are limits on how many posts or messages you can send in a short period to prevent spam and protect other users from being overwhelmed with unwanted content.

text: The service may ask for consent before enabling location features
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Before using any feature that requires your location, the service asks for your explicit permission. You can decline and continue using the rest of the service without restrictions.

text: The service may use a third-party payment provider governed by separate terms
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Payments are handled by an external provider with its own terms and privacy policy. You should review those separately before entering payment details.

text: Users under 13 must have a parent or guardian agree to the terms on their behalf
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Children under 13 cannot create an account on their own. A parent or guardian must review and accept the terms, taking responsibility for the child's use of the service.

text: The service may store your preferences to personalize your experience
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Settings such as language, notification preferences, and display options are stored so that the service remembers your preferences the next time you log in.

text: The service may use hashed email addresses for fraud detection purposes
label: potentially_fair
explanation: A one-way encrypted version of your email address may be used to check for fraudulent account creation patterns. The hash cannot be reversed to reveal your actual email.

text: The service may apply rate limits to API access to ensure fair use
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Developers using the service's API are subject to usage limits to ensure the service runs well for everyone. Exceeding the limit may result in temporary access restrictions.

text: The service may archive inactive accounts but does not delete them automatically
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Accounts that have not been active for a long time may be moved to an archive, but they are not deleted. You can reactivate your account by logging in again.

text: The service may use your feedback to improve its products
label: potentially_fair
explanation: If you submit feedback or suggestions, the service may use your ideas to improve its features. You won't receive compensation, but your feedback helps shape the product for everyone.

text: The service may check your account for compliance with export control regulations
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Some services are legally restricted in certain countries. The service may check your location to comply with export control laws, which could limit what features are available to you.

text: Content you report as inappropriate will be reviewed within 48 hours
label: potentially_fair
explanation: When you report content that violates the rules, a moderator will review it within 48 hours. You may receive a notification once a decision has been made.

text: The service may use industry-standard encryption for all stored passwords
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Your password is stored using a strong, industry-standard hashing method. This means the service never stores your actual password and cannot read it.

text: The service may limit certain features for accounts with a history of policy violations
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Accounts that have previously broken the service's rules may find that certain features are restricted. This is a graduated approach to managing repeat violations.

text: The service may use trusted sub-processors to handle specific technical functions
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Some technical tasks, like sending emails or processing payments, are handled by specialist third-party companies. These sub-processors are bound by data protection agreements.

text: The service may send you a warning before taking action on a suspected policy violation
label: potentially_fair
explanation: Before suspending or limiting your account, the service will typically send you a warning explaining what the issue is and giving you a chance to resolve it.

text: The service can reassign your username to another user without your consent
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Your username — which may represent your identity or brand — can be taken from you and given to someone else at any time, with no compensation or warning.

text: The service logs every product you look at and sells that to retailers
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Every item you view, click, or hover over is tracked and sold to retailers who use that information to target you with ads and adjust prices.

text: Your private calendar events are read and analyzed by the service
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: If you sync your calendar, the service reads your appointments, meeting details, and private plans. This information is used to build a profile of your habits and activities.

text: The service can report your activity to your employer without your knowledge
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: If you use the service through a workplace account, the service may share a detailed activity log with your employer, including content you considered private.

text: You have no right to know which specific data the service holds about you
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: The service does not have to show you exactly what personal information it has stored about you. You are kept in the dark about the scope of your own data profile.

text: The service may collect your medical appointment history through calendar sync
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Syncing your calendar allows the service to see events like doctor or therapy appointments, revealing sensitive health information you never directly shared.

text: The service charges you for data storage you did not knowingly create
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: The service creates and stores data about you — like logs and analytics — and then counts that toward your storage quota, charging you for space you never intentionally used.

text: Your activity on other websites is tracked through hidden code embedded in partner sites
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Code from this service is embedded in third-party websites. Even when you are not on this service's site, it tracks what pages you visit and what you do on them.

text: The service can share your data with any company it chooses to enter a partnership with
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: By agreeing to these terms, you allow the service to share your data with any new partner it signs a deal with in the future, with no further notification to you.

text: You cannot dispute a charge without first agreeing to binding arbitration
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Before the service will even hear a billing complaint from you, you must agree to have it settled through arbitration rather than in court — giving up your right to a fair legal hearing.

text: The service may transfer your genetic or biometric data to research companies
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: If you provide biometric data, it can be shared with research companies without your specific consent for each transfer, potentially exposing your most sensitive personal identifiers.

text: The service can intercept your emails if you use their email integration feature
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Connecting your email account allows the service to read the contents of your incoming and outgoing messages, not just metadata, to improve targeting and features.

text: Your account is subject to automated scoring that you cannot see or challenge
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: An invisible score is computed about you based on your behavior. This score affects how the service treats you — but you are never shown what it is or how to contest it.

text: The service keeps your data even if you were never a registered user
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: If someone else's account interacts with you — for example by importing your contact — the service may hold personal data about you even though you never signed up.

text: You agree that the service has no obligation to respond to your data requests
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: These terms state that the service may choose to ignore requests to access, correct, or delete your data. There is no guaranteed response time or commitment to act.

text: The service sells your sleep or health data to pharmaceutical companies
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Health and sleep information collected through the service or connected devices may be sold to pharmaceutical or insurance companies for research or commercial targeting.

text: Users have no rights over content once it is moderated or removed by the service
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Once the service removes your content for any reason, you lose all rights to it. You cannot retrieve it, appeal its removal, or publish it elsewhere without separate ownership proof.

text: The service builds a financial risk profile on you and shares it with lenders
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Your spending patterns and activity are analyzed to build a financial risk profile, which is then shared with banks or lenders — potentially affecting your ability to get credit.

text: The service may share your real name with anyone who knows your username
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: If someone looks up your username, the service may reveal your real name linked to that account, removing the anonymity you may have expected when creating a pseudonymous account.

text: The service may publish your submitted reviews even after you request their deletion
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Reviews you write and later ask to have deleted may remain publicly visible on the platform indefinitely, as the service retains a license to display them permanently.

text: Your account data is used to create shadow profiles of people you contact
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: When you message or interact with people who are not registered, the service uses details from your account to create profiles of those individuals without their consent.

text: The service can override parental controls set by account administrators
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Even if an administrator or parent sets restrictions on an account, the service can override those controls for commercial or operational reasons without notice.

text: The service may use your credit card number to link your online and offline activity
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Your payment card number may be used as a cross-platform identifier to connect your in-store purchases with your online activity, building a richer profile about you.

text: You cannot pause your subscription — you must cancel and lose all your data
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: There is no option to temporarily pause your account. If you stop paying, your subscription ends and all your stored data is immediately deleted with no grace period.

text: The service may permanently revoke your access for any reason deemed appropriate by it alone
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: The service can remove your access permanently based on its own judgment, with no requirement to provide a reason, no notice, and no right of appeal available to you.

text: Your typing is analyzed to detect emotional state and used in content recommendations
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: The way you type — including hesitations, corrections, and speed — is analyzed to infer your emotional state, which is then used to adjust what content is shown to you.

text: The service uses your data to generate synthetic users for product testing
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Information about how you use the service is used to create artificial user profiles for product testing and research. These synthetic identities are derived from your real behavior.

text: The service may keep a permanent record of all usernames you have ever used
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: Every username or alias you have ever used on the service is permanently stored and linked to your account identity, even if you changed it to protect your privacy.

text: Your data may be retained by a defunct subsidiary even after the service is closed
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: If the service shuts down, data held by its subsidiary companies may not be deleted and could remain in systems that are no longer actively managed or secured.

text: The service may sell your behavioral profile when you close your account
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: When you delete your account, the service may treat your data as an asset to be sold to third parties as part of a final commercial transaction before closing your record.

text: The service may limit your download speeds if you use more than a set monthly quota
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If you use more data than a monthly threshold, your download speeds may be reduced for the rest of the period. This limit is not always prominently stated when you sign up.

text: The service may resell your anonymized data to research organizations
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Data stripped of direct identifiers may be sold to research organizations. While your name is removed, patterns in the data could still be used to re-identify you.

text: The service may issue service credits instead of cash refunds for outages
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If the service experiences downtime, compensation may be given as credits for future use rather than as a refund to your original payment method.

text: The service may share your engagement data with content creators on the platform
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Creators whose content you interact with may receive data about your engagement, including how long you watched, what you skipped, and whether you shared their content.

text: The service may require new consent before allowing access after a policy update
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: After significant policy changes, you may be locked out of your account until you actively read and accept the new terms, even if you have been a long-term user.

text: The service may use your activity to generate automated recommendations for advertisers
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Advertisers can receive automatically generated guidance based on aggregate user activity — including yours — telling them the best times and formats to reach their target audience.

text: Users who downgrade plans may lose access to content created on premium tiers
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: If you move from a paid plan to a free one, some content you created or stored while on the premium plan may become inaccessible until you upgrade again.

text: The service may share your support ticket contents with product teams
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: When you contact support, the contents of your messages may be shared internally with product and engineering teams, exposing details about your issues and usage patterns.

text: The service may use your location to apply local tax rates without disclosure
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Your location is used to calculate applicable taxes on purchases, but the service may not clearly disclose this before you complete a transaction.

text: The service may use your search queries to improve its paid advertising products
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Searches you perform within the platform contribute to improving the service's advertising tools, which are then offered as a commercial product to paying advertisers.

text: The service may assign your account to a different legal entity in your region
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Depending on where you live, your account and data may be managed by a local subsidiary or partner company, which operates under its own separate privacy terms.

text: The service may prioritize paid users in customer support response times
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Free tier users may experience significantly longer wait times for support responses, with paid subscribers receiving faster or dedicated assistance.

text: The service may use behavioral data to adjust the difficulty of the product for you
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: The service may analyze your behavior to adapt its interface or product in ways intended to maximize your engagement or increase the chance you make a purchase.

text: The service may disable features that compete with its own paid offerings
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Third-party integrations or features that overlap with the service's own premium products may be restricted or removed to encourage users to purchase the service's version.

text: The service may require a 30-day notice period before you can cancel your subscription
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: To cancel your plan, you may need to submit a cancellation request 30 days in advance. If you forget, you may be charged for another full billing cycle.

text: The service may share your sleep schedule data with third-party marketers
label: clearly_unfair
explanation: If the app tracks your sleeping habits, that information about when you sleep and wake up can be sold to marketers who use it to time their messages for maximum impact.

text: The service may send your usage data to your internet service provider
label: potentially_unfair
explanation: Details about how and when you use this service may be shared with your internet service provider, giving them insight into your online habits beyond what they can see themselves.

text: The service may ask you to verify your identity when logging in from a shared network
label: potentially_fair
explanation: If you log in from a shared or public network, you may be asked to complete an additional identity check before accessing your account, which is a security precaution.
